context.projectOverview: agent-bober multi-provider LLM harness. This sprint repoints the `opus` model shorthand to Claude Opus 4.8 (GA 2026-05-28, api id claude-opus-4-8) and adds a pinned `opus-4-7` alias. Pure model-resolver change; NO SDK or adapter work (those are later sprints in this spec).
relevantFiles: src/orchestrator/model-resolver.ts — SHORTHAND_MAP (lines ~22-33); change opus modelId to claude-opus-4-8, add opus-4-7 entry
src/orchestrator/model-resolver.test.ts — update the opus assertion to claude-opus-4-8, add an opus-4-7 alias test, keep the full-id passthrough tests

keyPrinciples: ESM: relative imports end in .js. consistent-type-imports. Prefix unused with _.
claude-opus-4-8 is a dateless pinned snapshot — use the bare id, no date suffix.
Do NOT touch the Anthropic adapter or @anthropic-ai/sdk in this sprint.
baselineNote: Baseline on this branch (stacked on the prompt-caching work): typecheck/lint/build PASS; `npm run test` has 2 PRE-EXISTING flaky timeout failures in the 'registers exactly 37 tools' tests (tests/mcp/external-server-graph.test.ts and/or src/mcp/tools/tools.test.ts). Those 2 are the ONLY tolerated failures for C5; anything else is a regression.
